# STRAT.033 ? Never Split the Difference (Voss)

**Type:** PHILOSOPHY
**Category:** strategic_frameworks
**Subcategory:** negotiation_influence
**Domain:** NEGOTIATION_INFLUENCE
**Status:** active

## Core Principles
Tactical empathy; calibrated questions; mirroring; labeling; accusation audit; 'that's right' vs 'you're right'; Ackerman model

## Application
Use tactical empathy; ask calibrated questions; mirror last 3 words; label emotions; preempt accusations; seek 'that's right'; Ackerman bargaining

## Key Values
- Tactical empathy
- Calibrated questions
- Emotional labeling
- Mirroring
- Strategic concessions

philosophy, strategic-framework, negotiation_influence
